package rulecoverage

func PositiveDurationNanosecondsZeroCheck() string {
    ruleID := "duration_nanoseconds_zero_check"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Duration zero checks written as `d.Nanoseconds() == 0` instead of `d == 0`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
